claim: Les Thermes de Spa 2026 prices: €37 weekend 3-hr pass, €48 full day, €31 evening; couple 10-pass €510; closed June 7-12.
quote: 3 hours (weekend/holidays): €37 ... Full day (weekdays): €48 ... Couple x 10 passes: €510 ... Maintenance closure June 7-12, 2026

claim: Les Thermes de Spa is fed by exclusive natural mineral waters with a thermal heritage going back more than 300 years.
quote: Exclusive natural mineral waters and a thermal heritage going back more than 300 years

claim: Thermae Boetfort 2026 day pass: €38.50 weekday, €41.50 weekend; 10-visit card €345.
quote: Weekday (Monday-Friday): €38.50 ... Weekend/Holidays: €41.50 ... 10 visits: €345.00

claim: Thermae Boetfort is set in a 400-year-old castle estate northeast of Brussels with public and private sauna areas.
quote: historical wellness centre in a 400-year-old castle estate ... public saunas (nude and bathing suit sections) or private saunas

claim: Thermae Grimbergen sits in a green setting on Brussels' northern edge, near the Grimbergen basilica, with 20 years of operation.
quote: located in the green periphery of northern Brussels, in the relaxing and rural setting of the garden ... 20 years of expertise

claim: Waer Waters in Groot-Bijgaarden has six pools and gardens, rated 8.9 by couples.
quote: peaceful getaway with six pools and garden spaces ... rated it 8.9 for a two-person trip

claim: Waer Waters covers 12,000 m² of relaxation areas with romantic packages; rooms from €241/night, Sunday night promo €220.
quote: veritable temple of relaxation covering 12,000 m² ... Accommodation starts from €241/night ... night at €220 when booking on Sunday

claim: Dolce La Hulpe holds an 800 m² Cinq Mondes spa with 6 treatment rooms, a Japanese aroma bath, Grand Hammam, and 2 VIP couples rooms.
quote: 800 m² Cinq Mondes Spa ... 6 treatment rooms, a Japanese aroma and flower bath, a Grand Hammam with 4 scrub tables, 2 double VIP rooms for couple treatments

claim: Dolce La Hulpe Brussels rates start from $112; couple Hammam ceremony from €230pp.
quote: Room rates start from $112 ... Couples treatments start at €230 per person

claim: Hotel Sanglier Durbuy offers an intimate wood-and-marble wellness centre that can be booked privately, capped at 6 guests, with hydro beds and a jacuzzi view.
quote: intimate space adorned in wood and marble ... booked privately outside opening hours ... maximum of 6 guests, and the hydro beds are incredibly relaxing

claim: Sanglier wellness stay package starts from €580/night for 2 with half-board; spa-only access €99/person.
quote: Wellness access for €99/person ... wellness stay package starting from €580/night for 2 people with a half-board formula

claim: Bois d'Arlon Resort houses a Cinq Mondes spa with hot pool, sauna, hammam, indoor and outdoor jacuzzis; capped at 20 guests; hotel guests get 50% off.
quote: hot-water pool, a sauna, a hammam and an indoor and outdoor bubble bath ... limited to 20 people at a time ... hotel guests benefit from a 50% discount

claim: Treelodge in Retie operates four luxury treehouses in a private forest; each has its own hot tub on the terrace, wood-burning stove and equipped kitchen.
quote: small-scale accommodation in a private forest in Retie with three stylish and cosy tree houses, each with its own hot tub on the terrace ... All tree houses are super well insulated, have electric heating, a wood-burning stove

claim: Treelodge starts from €290/night and accommodates two or more depending on the treehouse.
quote: Treelodge starts from €290 per night, which would accommodate two people or more

claim: Nutchel Les Ardennes (Martelange) is a 30-cabin forest village near the Belgian-Luxembourg border; 11 cabins have a Nordic bath on top.
quote: natural estate with 30 pretty wooden cabins, 11 of which have a Nordic bath at the top

claim: Nutchel cabins start from €109/night, two-night minimum, no TV or wifi to force a digital detox; some cabins include hot tubs.
quote: From €109 / night ... minimum duration of a stay is of 2 nights ... No TV nor internet here, to help you disconnect

claim: Domaine de Ronchinne is an 1890 castle on a 42-ha estate near Namur with castle rooms, stables, treehouse and loft cubes, plus sauna, hammam and indoor pool.
quote: 42-hectare estate ... Maison du Jardinier, treehouse, and loft cubes ... beautiful sauna, hammam, and indoor pool

claim: Le Lov't near Yvoir is a private river-side suite with jacuzzi, fireplace, candlelight; from €225 weekday, €295 weekend, with champagne and platter packages.
quote: private Jacuzzi, a cosy fire and a comfortable sofa ... price of a night at Lov't starts from 225€ during the week and up to 295€ at the weekend

claim: Justalittlecabin is a B&B in Ninove (East Flanders), about 30 km from Ghent, marketed as a romantic nature-immersion stay.
quote: Bed and Breakfast justalittlecabin, Ninove, Belgium

claim: Belgian bubble-dome stays start at €170 for two; key picks include CellSphair near Dinant, Cocoon Brussels, Duiniek near Coxyde, and Nids des Marais Ciney.
quote: from €170 for two people ... CellSphair near Dinant, Les Nids des Marais Ciney, or Duiniek near Coxyde

claim: ONE TWO FOUR Hotel & Spa is a 4* mansion in central Ghent with private spa (sauna, steam room, rain shower, heated armchairs) bookable in 1-h slots free for guests.
quote: 4* hotel housed in a majestic 19th-century mansion in the heart of Ghent ... spa access is included ... time slot (1h) between 7am and 9:30pm ... sauna, steam room, rain shower and heated armchairs

claim: Pillows Reylof in Ghent has a sauna and 25 m² wellness pool inside a boutique-hotel setting.
quote: visit to our sauna and immerse yourself in our 25 m² wellness swimming pool

claim: Wooden Nest is a wooden chalet with a fully private wellness area for two, isolated among the firs in the Ardennes.
quote: Wooden Nest, a marvellous wooden chalet with a fully private wellness area for 2 people in the middle of the fir trees

claim: Hôtel Panorama Bouillon is a 24-room 4* hotel above Bouillon castle with a privatizable wellness centre and views of the fortress.
quote: 24 rooms overlooking the castle ... 4* hotel with a magnificent view of the castle, a privatized wellness center

claim: Kasteel van Ordingen is a 5* medieval castle hotel near Sint-Truiden with 34 luxurious rooms; Hotel Dukes' Palace is a 15th-c castle hotel in Bruges.
quote: Kasteel van Ordingen ... 5-star medieval castle has been beautifully restored and offers 34 luxurious rooms ... Hotel Dukes' Palace, Bruges ... dates back to the 15th century
